summaryMarkdown: Created the scoped gamma smoke file at `.agent_cache/codex-subagents-simple-smoke/output/hello-gamma.md` with a minimal `Hello, world` message and a unique gamma id, keeping the change isolated to the owned path.
checksRun: /bin/bash -lc "for f in .agent_cache/codex-subagents-simple-smoke/output/hello-*.md; do printf '%s: ' \""'$f"; sed -n '"'2p' \""'$f"; done'
openRisks: Did not run repo-wide quality gates or add a dev log because this subtask was restricted to a single owned cache markdown file and requested the smallest relevant checks.
name: hello-gamma
mission: Create the gamma smoke markdown file with a single Hello, world message and a unique id.
extraInstructions: Write only your owned markdown file.
Include a unique id string for gamma.
